title: Superseded draft
author: hesong0222-dev

data.description: Replaces 9 distinct transformer blocks with 3 shared transformer blocks repeated 3 times, using a learned recurrence gate after each shared block application.
Input and output embeddings are tied.
Uses fewer KV heads than attention heads.
RIOM-flavored non-record variant with shared-depth recurrence and learned per-loop/per-block sigmoid gate.

novel_contributions: Introduces a RIOM-style non-record variant using parameter sharing across transformer depth.
Uses 3 shared transformer blocks repeated 3 times to preserve nominal 9-block depth with fewer parameters.
Adds a lightweight learned recurrence gate after each shared block application.
Keeps tokenizer, dataset, optimizer family, and export path unchanged from the baseline package.
Achieves a smaller compressed artifact size and lower validation bpb than the referenced v0 dev prefix.
